# Evidence Brief - Child survival (SDG 2.2, 3.2): Kenya

*Generated by CEDAR on 2026-06-21T07:45:23Z | Glass-box mode: every figure is cited below.*

## Key findings

- [+] Under-5 mortality rate fell from 53.1 to 39.6 per 1,000 live births between 2010 and 2023 (-25.4%, -2.2%/yr). [1]
- [!] As of 2023, the value of 39.6 does not yet meet the benchmark of 25 (SDG 3.2.1: reduce under-5 mortality to at least as low as 25 per 1,000 live births by 2030); a gap of 14.6 per 1,000 live births remains. [2]
- [!] At the 2010-2023 pace, the benchmark (25) is reached around 2037 - 7 year(s) late. [3]
- [i] In 2023, Kenya (39.6) sits below the Sub-Saharan Africa average (73.2 per 1,000 live births). [4]
- [+] Infant mortality rate fell from 38.9 to 34.7 per 1,000 live births between 2015 and 2023 (-10.8%, -1.4%/yr). [5]
- [!] As of 2023, the value of 34.7 does not yet meet the benchmark of 12 (SDG 3.2 (neonatal proxy context): reduce preventable infant/newborn deaths); a gap of 22.7 per 1,000 live births remains. [6]
- [!] At the 2015-2023 pace, the benchmark (12) is reached around 2066 - 36 year(s) late. [7]
- [+] DPT immunization coverage rose from 92 to 93 % of children 12-23 months between 2014 and 2023 (+1.1%, +0.1%/yr). [8]
- [OK] As of 2023, the value of 93 meets the benchmark of 90 (IA2030 / GVAP benchmark: >=90% DTP3 national coverage); target achieved. [9]
- [+] Stunting prevalence (under-5) fell from 26.2 to 17.6 % of children under 5 between 2014 and 2022 (-32.8%, -4.9%/yr). [10]

## Data confidence & caveats

- **Under-5 mortality rate** - confidence: **High** (coverage 100%, latest 2023).
- **Infant mortality rate** - confidence: **High** (coverage 100%, latest 2023).
- **DPT immunization coverage** - confidence: **High** (coverage 100%, latest 2023).
- **Stunting prevalence (under-5)** - confidence: **Low** (coverage 30%, latest 2022).
    - Caveat: Sparse series: only 3 of 10 years carry a value (survey-dependent indicator). Treat year-on-year movement with caution.

## Methods & reproducibility

All figures are pulled from authoritative APIs and computed deterministically (trend = first vs latest observation; CAGR = compound annual rate; gap = distance to published benchmark). No figure is model-generated. Re-run any number with the query URLs in the evidence ledger below.
